name: should adjust specified year params when year_offset is specified
description: Test case for should adjust specified year params when year_offset is specified
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = (2023,2022) and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t77790ee4476d1c1f077ec5f395419935"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t77790ee4476d1c1f077ec5f395419935.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "tff71b0cd30d8ec62e38ebdfd86a36823" on "tff71b0cd30d8ec62e38ebdfd86a36823"."pid" = "player"."pid" and tff71b0cd30d8ec62e38ebdfd86a36823.year = player_years.year + -1 where player.pos IN ('WR') and player_seasonlogs.espn_open_score > '0'
